title: Nature's Basket Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nature's Basket Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nature's Basket Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
